title: Senior Electrical Engineer [SL]
description:
• Demonstrate strong site problem-solving and coordination skills with clients and stakeholders.
  • Apply solid engineering expertise in electrical design, including thorough knowledge of building services codes and standards.
  • Ensure material quality and installation workmanship by suppliers and subcontractors in accordance with the ISO Quality Plan.
  • Coordinate, monitor, and control suppliers’ materials, equipment, and subcontractors’ installation quality.
  • Prepare shop drawings and manage drawing coordination with relevant disciplines.
  • Develop work schedules and attend client, consultant, and internal coordination meetings.
  • Assist the Project Manager in daily operations in line with the master project schedule, quality, and safety requirements.
  • Maintain effective coordination with the main contractor to minimize rework and site issues.
  • Control site materials and equipment usage to reduce wastage and improve efficiency.
  • Liaise closely with suppliers and subcontractors to prevent delivery delays affecting project progress.
  • Inspect works and materials to identify and rectify non-conformance, preventing defects.
  • Explore and implement new technologies and installation methods to enhance productivity.
  • Monitor site progress closely and communicate clear instructions to suppliers and subcontractors.


Requirements

  • Diploma in Mechanical & Electrical or relevant or equivalent
  • Preferable 3 - 5 years construction M&E experience.
  • Knowledge of ISO 9000 , 45001, 14001.
  • Preferable with ISO Internal Quality Auditor and Building Construction Safety Supervisor Course

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

EA Personnel Name: Law Mei Fong

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
